warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Band Row Rotate Press
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Clean Pull
3 Hang Power Clean
10 Front Squat

strength.name: Power Clean
strength.description:
4x3 | * Focus on triple extension
* Fast Elbows | E2MOM 12min
BUILD 3 Sets
00:00 3 @ 50%
02:00 3 @ 60%
HOLD 4 Sets
04:00 3 @ 75%
06:00 3 @ 75%
08:00 3 @ 75%
10:00 3 @ 75%

strength.name: Front Squat
strength.description:
4x3 | * Breathe and brace at the top of each rep
* Elbows Up
* Keep knees out | E3MOM 21min
BUILD 2 Sets
00:00 5 @ 50%
03:00 5 @ 60%
06:00 5 @ 70%
HOLD 5 Sets
09:00 3 @ 80%
12:00 3 @ 80%
15:00 3 @ 80%
18:00 3 @ 80%

metcon.name: The Chief
metcon.description:
Max rounds in 3 minutes of:
3 Power Cleans, 135#/95#
6 Push-ups
9 Squats
Rest 1-minute.
Repeat for a total of 5 cycles

hypertrophy.reasoning: Address posterior chain and upper back stability to balance quad/front-loaded strength work without fatiguing recovery.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Power Clean, 4 by 3 at 75 percent. Strength: Front Squat, 4 by 3 at 80 percent. Metcon: The Chief. Workout: 3 Power Cleans, 135#/95#, 6 Push-ups, 9 Squats. For hypertrophy, focus on back, rear deltoids, glutes.
